series_metadata.series_description: Committee reports anf proposed model laws from the National Association of Insurance Commisioners (NAIC) Committee. Notes, drafts, emails, and proposals.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until closed by attorney; then on-site for 2 years; then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office until closed by attorney; then on-site for 2 years; then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
